data.summary: Governance Founding Session — established the complete AI companion hierarchy for all three repos. Git-cloned Codex (5,300 LOC), SproutLab (61,700 LOC), and SEP Invoicing (7,100 LOC). Analyzed 74,521 total lines across 41 split modules. Drafted 11 configuration files (CLAUDE.md x4, AGENTS.md, Memory.md, PERSONA_REGISTRY.md, SKILL.md x4) for Claude Code migration. Built an interactive HTML governance blueprint artifact.
open_todos: Update HTML artifact with Governor tier visualization
Import Lore entries into Codex canons.json
Place .md files in repos when Claude Code migration begins
data.handoff: 11 files drafted and delivered as zip. Governance hierarchy: Consul → Cipher → Builders (Aurelius/Lyra/Solara) → Governors (Maren/Kael for SproutLab). 6 canons established. 4 Lore entries written. HTML blueprint artifact updated. Files are future-proofing for Claude Code; usable now as Claude.ai chat reference.
